---
title: bare-return
description: "Warn about bare returns with named results."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Warn about bare returns with named results. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
func count() (n int) { n = 1; return }
```

## Good

```go
func count() (n int) { n = 1; return n }
```

## Enable

This extended rule runs when selected with `--only bare-return`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all-rules`. The default severity is `warning`.
